name: Crumb-Topped Baked French Toast
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------Cinnamon Syrup-------------------------------
1 ⅓ cups Sugar
⅓ cup Water
2⁄3 cups White corn syrup
1 tsp Cinnamon
5 oz Evaporated milk
½ tsp Almond flavoring
1 tbsp Butter
1. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
3. Place the coated slices on a greased cookie sheet.
4. Drizzle melted butter over the bread.
5. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
6. To make syrup, in a saucepan combine sugar, water, corn syrup, and cinnamon. Bring to a boil and cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in evaporated milk, almond flavoring, and butter until well blended.
7. Serve the warm syrup over toast. Yield: 4 servings. Pair with Canadian bacon, bacon, or sausage as desired.
Note: The recipe is forgiving; feel free to double it after the first batch is enjoyed, especially when friends are visiting.
